Text.Page:
Maon's cabin probably isn't safe, either. You should check it out.

You can get there by following the western road from here, but beware of the terrons. They get in the way more than we'd like.
When you get there, ask Phonon to introduce you to his father, Maon.

Hi!

Keta told you to meet my father? Well, he's over there.

Another with a mind bent to slaughter is the last thing we need around here.

My son says you may be different. That's all well and good, but if you're interested in restoring peace, you must also convince me you aren't just another interloper with mayhem on your mind.
